tier_1.label: highly_reusable
tier_1.description: Strong signal, core RAG asset, likely to remain valuable over time

tier_2.label: useful_context
tier_2.description: Good supporting context, somewhat reusable, may be topic-specific

tier_3.label: acceptable
tier_3.description: Acceptable but lower-value, narrow utility, transient or structurally weaker

verification_confidence.description: LLM verification confidence score (0-10 scale from llm_review.verification_confidence)

human_approved.description: Binary: whether human_review.decision is 'approved_by_human'. Adds a direct score boost.

issues_found_count.description: Number of issues found during verification (0-10, inverted: fewer issues = higher score)

why_it_matters_quality.description: Quality of why_it_matters field: 1.0 if present and substantive (>30 chars), 0.5 if short, 0.0 if empty/missing

has_structured_numbers.description: Binary: whether important_numbers array is non-empty

source_trust_score.description: Domain trust score from domain_trust_tiers config (high=100, medium=50, low=10)

topic_centrality.description: How central the topic is: 1.0 for monetary_policy/fiscal_policy/liquidity, 0.7 for market_structure, 0.5 for other

event_significance.description: Event type significance: 1.0 for fed_policy/central_bank_action, 0.8 for fiscal_policy, 0.6 for data_release, 0.4 for other
